items.title: Hopes of Lebanon Cease-fire Falter as Israel and Hezbollah Fight
items.summary: The U.S.-brokered agreement requires Hezbollah, which Iran backs, to stop firing first. But the group, not party to the talks, rejected the conditions as a virtual surrender.
